title: coleus lyratus
intro: Coleus lyratus, also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus forskohlii, is a perennial herb native to tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The plant contains forskolin, a diterpenoid compound that has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and cardiovascular benefits. The health benefits of Coleus lyratus include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight management. Herbal preparations of Coleus lyratus are typically made into capsules, tablets, or teas, and can be used to support various health goals, including weight loss and improved circulation.
